productDisplayName: Puma Kids Unisex Foundation Pack of 3 Crew Socks
description: Pack of three pairs of ankle length socks in white, red and orangeMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneRib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitThese bright-coloured, soft socks will keep little feet comfortable inside their shoes.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
